title: Lawyer says detained Gaza doctor was severely beaten in Israeli jail
summary_full: The lawyer for Dr Hussam Abu Safiya tells the BBC his client was so badly beaten he could not recognise him during a visit last week.
summary_public: The lawyer for Dr Hussam Abu Safiya tells the BBC his client was so badly beaten he could not recognise him during a visit last week.

IL.label: negative
IL.evidence: detained Gaza doctor was severely beaten in Israeli jail
